search_candidates.title: Annual Reports - PT Sinar Mas Agro Resources and Technology ...
search_candidates.content: # Annual Reports. ## Annual and Sustainability Report 2025. ## Board of Commissioners’ Report. ## Board of Directors’ Report. Established in 1962 and listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange in 1992, PT Sinar Mas Agro Resources and Technology Tbk (“SMART”) is one of the leading, publicly-listed, integrated palm-based consumer companies in Indonesia, generating revenue of almost Rp 87 trillion and net profit of Rp 2.58 trillion in 2025. SMART’s efficient integrated operations focus on technology-driven and responsible production. Our primary activities start from cultivating 136,000 hectares of oil palm plantations in Indonesia, including plasma smallholders; to harvesting and extracting fresh fruit bunches into crude palm oil and palm kernel; and further processing them into a broad range of value-added products such as cooking oil, margarine, shortening, biodiesel, and oleochemicals; as well as merchandising palm products globally. SMART markets and exports palm-based consumer products in the form of bulk and industrial oil. ## Financial Performance. ###### FINANCIAL REVIEW. ## Sustainability Performance. ###### Integrated Annual Report 2021.

PERUBAHAN PERATURAN YANG BERPENGARUH SIGNIFIKAN TERHADAP PERSEROAN REGULATION CHANGES THAT SIGNIFICANTLY INFLUENCE THE COMPANY Tidak ada perubahan peraturan pemerintah dan otoritas There were no changes in government regulations and pasar modal yang berpengaruh signifikan terhadap capital market authorities that significantly impacted Perseroan pada tahun 2020. Untuk itu Perseroan senantiasa the Company in 2020. For this reason, the Company menjaga kepatuhan atas ketentuan tersebut seraya always maintains compliance with these provisions while meningkatkan berbagai upaya untuk meningkatkan kinerja increasing various efforts to improve the Company’s Perseroan secara berkelanjutan. performance in a sustainable manner.
